posts.title: The 2026 Meetup roadmap—Building on our 2025 momentum
posts.author: Chiara Vivaldi
posts.summary: Meetup announced its 2026 product roadmap featuring three major initiatives: launching a modernized mobile experience (already live), streamlining community-building through tools like a unified organizer app and QR-code attendance tracking, and enhancing member confidence with richer profiles, Super Organizer badges, and experimental connection features.

posts.title: Discover Meetup's fresh look: A new design for a new era of making connections
posts.author: Chiara Vivaldi
posts.summary: Meetup launched a major redesign featuring a vibrant visual identity, improved navigation, and better event discovery tools. The update maintains core functionality while modernizing the platform to appeal to younger users, particularly Gen Z and young Millennials who comprise 40% of the platform's active users. The redesign is live on web with mobile rollout planned.

posts.title: 16 recent Meetup improvements you might have missed
posts.author: Meetup Team
posts.summary: A roundup of sixteen platform improvements aimed at making Meetup more intuitive, reliable, and efficient for organizers and members alike.

posts.title: The 2025 Meetup progress report
posts.author: Chiara Vivaldi
posts.summary: Product lead reflection on the past year's accomplishments and priorities for upcoming months, highlighting platform growth and community milestones.

posts.title: Personalized event recommendations that deliver—4 tips to boost your RSVPs
posts.author: Meetup Team
posts.summary: Details new recommendation features and organizer strategies to increase event visibility and drive higher RSVP rates through personalized discovery.

posts.title: Snappier, more reliable messaging is here
posts.author: Meetup Team
posts.summary: Messaging updates include greater clarity about message delivery, more consistent notifications, and an updated user interface for better communication between members and organizers.

posts.title: Introducing Meetup Starter
posts.author: Meetup Team
posts.summary: Meetup introduced a new free plan called Meetup Starter to make community building more accessible to new organizers, allowing management of one group with up to two monthly in-person events and ten attendees per event.

posts.title: Exciting updates to Member Dues
posts.author: Meetup Team
posts.summary: Stripe payment processing is now available to all organizers for collecting membership fees, making it easier to manage recurring dues for community groups.
